name: Family-Style Chuck Wagon Chili
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup sliced green onions with tops
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan or Dutch oven, brown the meat with garlic until cooked through.
2. Add the remaining ingredients except green onions and optional toppings.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and let it simmer uncovered for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in the green onions and continue simmering for an additional 5 to 10 minutes, or until the chili reaches your desired consistency.
5. Serve the chili in bowls with optional toppings such as shredded Monterey Jack or cheddar cheese, hot cooked rice, sour cream, chopped cilantro, and additional picante sauce. Makes about 4 servings (5 cups) of chili.
A real crowd pleaser, this savory chili tastes like it simmered all day but is ready to serve in about half an hour. If desired, black beans or pinto beans may be substituted for kidney beans.
